name: task-manager
description: Tree-based task list management with SQLite persistence

tools.name: add-task
tools.description:
Add a new task to the tree under a parent.task_id. Use parent_task_id=0 to attach under the session root task.

Returns the new task's integer id.

Example: add_task(parent_task_id=0, description='Create login endpoint', detailed_plan='Write auth handler...', automated_verification='pytest tests/test_auth.py', human_verification='curl POST /login and verify 200', priority=1)

parent_task_id.description: ID of the parent task (0 = session root)

detailed_plan.description: Step-by-step instructions for the executor skill

automated_verification.description: Executable deterministic verification command or script

tools.name: remove-task
tools.description: Remove a task by its id. Fails if the task has children — remove children first.

task_id.description: ID of the task to remove

tools.name: list-tasks
tools.description:
List tasks under a parent. Use parent_task_id=0 to list children of the session root.

Returns a numbered list ordered by priority, with each task showing its id.

Example output:
  1. Create login endpoint (Task ID: #3)
     Priority: 1 | Status: pending
  2. Add password hashing (Task ID: #4)
     Priority: 2 | Status: pending

parent_task_id.description: ID of the parent task to list children for (0 = session root)

tools.name: set-task-priority
tools.description: Update the sort priority of a task. Lower numbers = higher priority.

task_id.description: ID of the task to update
